name: MN3011 Reverb
description: An emulation of a classic BBD 'reverb' using the MN3011 bucket-brigade device model. Produces a warm, lo-fi reverb character with analog coloration.
author: Audiofab

controls.name: Repeats
controls.description: Feedback amount — density of the reverb.

controls.name: Mix
controls.description: Blend between dry and wet signal.
